missions.name: Take a creative group selfie with all members making a funny face
Compose a 4-line poem about the Christmas dinner and recite it together
Build a human pyramid for a photo (safe and small)
Find a colleague from another table and include them in a team photo
Create a mini 'table cheer' and perform it
Make a paper chain with each member writing one positive trait on it
Solve a short Christmas riddle together (prepared by organizers)
Take a group photo holding 3 hidden objects found in the room
Create a mini skit (30 sec) about 'ugly sweaters' and perform it
Find 3 colleagues from other tables and take a funny group photo together
